title: StorageHybridMatch
description:
One hit in [`StorageHybridSearchResult::results`]. Mirror of
[`crate::HybridMatch`] — kept in sync manually; compared via
`cargo test -p nexus-bootstrap --test ipc_schema_emit`.

block_type.description: Block type from the FTS arm; `None` for vector-only hits.

excerpt.description: FTS excerpt when available, otherwise the matched chunk text.

fts_rank.description: 0-based rank in the FTS arm, when it hit there.

score.description:
Fused RRF score. Higher is more relevant; only comparable
within one reply.

vector_rank.description: 0-based rank in the vector arm, when it hit there.
